What's going on everyone? Before I, you know, we get into the nitty-gritty of the details of the program, I just wanted to give you a little bit of background so that you could have some conviction as to kind of the mastermind behind this and it certainly wasn't me. But it's actually Dr. Trevor Casci for those of you don't know, he's a very, very smart dude. I just wanted to give you a couple stats so that you could put your mind to rest and feel good about the recommendations that we have, all right? So he got his bachelor of science at 19 years old, yes that's 19. He got his PhD in biochemistry at 23 years old, which is the youngest in US history for biochemistry. He was a former Olympic advisor for the country of Azerbaijan. He was actually recruited in his early 20s to go over there and basically monitor everything they had to do with the training and supplementation for their wrestling and Olympic lifting teams. So he was around around the clock and they recruited him based on the research that he was putting out and the protocols because they were deemed so effective. He's an editor of the precision nutrition textbook, so those of you who have heard of precision nutrition, he was also asked to basically help him formulate their certification, but because he works with us at Precision Labs, he declined respectfully, but he's a generally very sought-after dude. He's director of medical science at LifexMD and he's obviously our director of science at Precision Labs and that's kind of just like the the the science-y, high-level athlete world because he's dealt with Olympians and champions, but also understands the biomedical side of it, of just looking at large populations and seeing what are the minimal interventions that we can create in order to create successful outcomes. And so I say this all because he's the guy who came up with this protocol. Alright, for Jempop to get them the best outcome given the requirements that we defined beforehand. Alright, so given those requirements for this population, which is the majority of the people that we serve, this is what we deemed to be optimal in terms of client interaction, experience, ease of views, sustainable outcome, creating clients that become coachable, and then also for the coach themselves, so that it's a scalable model for us to provide fulfillment. Right, and so trust him, he is smart and knowledgeable, both book smart, but also practical knowledge and and that's why we're so fortunate to have him on on our team and I think that you will feel the same way as well. But I just like to give that as backing so that you understand where this stuff comes from. It's not like we just pulled this out of the air, but we put a lot of thought into making something that was extremely simple for both the practitioner and for the end user so that we believe we can have optimal outcomes even if you don't have a very smart practitioner or an extremely motivated end user. We can still create great outcomes given the circumstances because of the process that we put in place to create it. So just wanted to give you that aforementioned before he kind of dives in and tells you far more detail than I will about how to successfully execute this program so that we can change people's lives.
